author: Maria T.
text: Absolutely stunning work. David and his team transformed our kitchen with a beautiful white quartz countertop. The installation was flawless and the whole process was smooth from start to finish.

author: James R.
text: We chose Alliance Granite for our bathroom remodel and couldn't be happier. The granite slab they selected for us is gorgeous and the craftsmanship is top-notch. Highly recommend.

author: Linda K.
text: Professional, prompt, and the quality of the stone is exceptional. Our kitchen island now has the most beautiful marble countertop. We get compliments from every guest.
